title: Honeycomb
excerpt: description: Send traces from Pages Functions to Honeycomb for observability using this Plugin. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. The Honeycomb Pages Plugin automatically sends traces to Honeycomb for analysis and observability. npm i @cloudflare/pages-plugin-honeycomb
